name_ja: グローバルユニチップ
layer_label_zh: ASIC 設計服務 · 台積電轉投資

fy_revenue.vs_street: +9% vs street FY26 (turnkey ramp on N3/N2 programs)

operating_margin.vs_street: +150 bps vs street, royalty/turnkey mix shift

non_ai_contribution.note: Networking + storage + non-AI custom silicon OP profit

multiple.vs_history: Peer Alchip 3661 ≈ 38–42×; we use 32× as gap-closing

price_target.kill_condition: If 2 named hyperscaler ASIC programs slip > 1 quarter or pivot to merchant silicon → revaluation thesis breaks. Cut half on first slip, exit on second.

A_ai_exposure.note: AI/HPC ASIC % of revenue — TSMC partnership + named hyperscaler programs (rising 50%+ FY26).

B_order_visibility.tier: [draft — ASIC backlog disclosure + program milestones are the receipts]
B_order_visibility.note: Target ★★★★ once tape-out cadence + backlog $ figure confirmed.

C_growth_potential.note: Custom silicon TAM expanding as hyperscalers diversify off NVDA — bottoms-up by program; 5y CAGR draft 30%.

D_cheap_to_fair.note: Auto-computed from PT vs price; gated by cycle multiplier.

E_increasing_moat.note: TSMC backing + advanced-node design service rare — N3/N2 design starts compounding.

F_revaluation.note: Multiple gap to Alchip is the explicit re-rating lever; close as programs reach mass production.

customers_named: AWS Trainium / Inferentia ASIC family — public attribution
Microsoft Maia / Cobalt programs — public attribution
Tesla Dojo training silicon — public attribution
Google TPU partner ecosystem — public attribution
order_visibility.capacity_locked: [draft — wafer commitments via TSMC for named programs; analyst to confirm tape-out and ramp dates]

receipts.summary_en: Major ASIC program tape-out + production ramp announcement (公開資訊觀測站 / 重大訊息).
receipts.summary_zh: 重大 ASIC 案 tape-out + 量產時程公告 (重大訊息)。
receipts.source: 公開資訊觀測站 · 重大訊息 (3443)

receipts.summary_en: Most recent 法說會: backlog $ figure + Q+N revenue visibility + tape-out cadence on N3/N2.
receipts.summary_zh: 最新法說會: 在手訂單金額 + Q+N 營收能見度 + N3/N2 tape-out 排程。

receipts.summary_en: TSMC N3/N2 design-starts data + EDA tool spend signals (Synopsys / Cadence Taiwan revenue mix).
receipts.summary_zh: 台積電 N3/N2 design starts + EDA 工具支出 (Synopsys / Cadence 台灣分區營收)。

order_visibility.kill: Loss of one named hyperscaler program to merchant silicon (NVDA / AMD) → cut half. Two losses → exit. Multiple gap vs Alchip persists > 6 months without margin step-up → re-evaluate revaluation thesis.

mechanism.en: [DRAFT ≥600 words required] Hyperscaler custom silicon strategy → ASIC partner selection (Alchip + GUC + Marvell + Broadcom) → wafer commitment via TSMC → revenue. GUC's TSMC backing = preferential N3/N2 access + co-development on advanced packaging. Map program-level revenue: NRE → mass-production turnkey → royalty tail; quantify per-program lifetime $ and GUC share of the 4-firm market.

moat_widening.en: [DRAFT] Advanced-node ASIC design service is a 4-firm market globally. TSMC's strategic interest in GUC = preferential capacity + IP access. Each design win compounds reference-customer effects. N2 ramp 2026–2027 widens the moat further as only GUC + Alchip have credible Taiwan-based N2 design teams at scale.

revaluation_thesis.en: [DRAFT] GUC trades at significant multiple discount to Alchip (~38–42×) despite similar program quality. Discount unwinds as: (a) GUC programs reach mass production, (b) margins step up as NRE recognition shifts to turnkey/royalty, (c) market reframes from 'TSMC subsidiary' to 'AI silicon enabler'.

kill_condition.en: Hyperscaler shifts custom silicon work in-house (Apple model). Or merchant silicon (NVDA, AMD) closes the cost-per-token gap, removing the ASIC rationale.

if_kill_then.en: Cut half on first major program loss. Exit on second. Move to substrate (3037) or test (2449) which are platform-agnostic to merchant-vs-ASIC mix.
